## ChunkSplitBySize.minSize property

The minimum size of a chunk, unit in bytes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
minSize?: number | undefined;
```

## Default Value

10000

## Example


```js
import { defineConfig } from '@lynx-js/rspeedy'

export default defineConfig({
  performance: {
    chunkSplit: {
      strategy: 'split-by-size',
      minSize: 20000,
    },
  },
})
```
